message:
bd-233g: implement VFS traits and UnixVfs with asupersync I/O

Add virtual filesystem abstraction layer (Vfs + VfsFile traits) and
a concrete UnixVfs implementation backed by asupersync's async fs module.
Enables future MemoryVfs for deterministic testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
